title: Agents prove design with real content, hostile states, and risk gates
summary: Generated interfaces are not refined until realistic content, complete state coverage, accessibility evidence, and consequence-aware AI review exist.
guidance: Require purpose, seed content, preview matrix, key-moment tuning, user review, accessibility review, and a do-not-build threshold.
do: Test long, large, multilingual, RTL, denied, offline, destructive, and restored states
Preserve edit, undo, uncertainty, and proportional confirmation
dont: Treat placeholder content, happy paths, or generated code as production evidence
verification: state matrix, accessibility evidence, user feedback, and AI risk assessment
